description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsGrey and brown wallet that has a textured look, zipped closure, an inner zipped pocket in the middle, one insert compartment on either sides with six card holders, zipped pocket at the back, stitch detailing and brand name embossed on the frontMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions:11 cm x 20.5 cm
